# Simplai by Liz

> AI automation consulting. Liz helps small businesses and solo founders automate the
> tasks that slow them down — repetitive work, manual processes, scattered data — with
> practical AI tools and dashboards. No jargon, no hype, just tools that work.

Tagline: "AI for the tasks that slow you down."

## About
Liz is a statistician and data scientist with 10+ years of experience. She works
one-on-one with clients to diagnose where time is being lost and design simple
automations and AI workflows around how they actually work. Services are delivered in
English and Spanish, remotely, worldwide.

## Services
- **Automating repetitive tasks** — remove manual, recurring work from your day.
- **AI tools for your workflow** — practical AI integrated into how you already work.
- **Dashboards you'll actually use** — clear data views for real decisions.
- **Simpler processes** — redesign workflows so they're easier and faster.

## How it works
1. Initial call — understand your goals.
2. Diagnosis and design — map where time is lost and what to automate.
3. Clear proposal — scope, plan, and pricing up front.
4. Building with you — implement collaboratively.
5. Delivery and support — hand off and keep it running.

## Who it's for
Small business owners, solo founders, and teams drowning in repetitive manual tasks
who want to use AI and automation without the technical complexity.
